name: Degrees of Lewdity RPG
description:
✩ Since you can remember, you've lived in this shitty little town in the orphanage on Domus Street. You play an 18-year-old boy/girl/other in a town full of people with bad intentions, crime is high, and so is libido. Go to school and find honest work, turn to a life of crime, or sell your body for something more carnal. ✩

1st intro: The Original DoL Game Intro (Definitely more of a slow-burn, adventure style bot)

2nd intro: Robin Intro (For the Robin fans)

Coming soon...

3rd intro: Kylar Intro

4th intro: Sydney Intro

5th intro: Whitney Intro

The message after your first response might need a bit of manual fixing or rerolling, one the first message is good, the rest of the convo should be smooth!

Current ver: Polishing :P (it needs a lot of fixing, so expect a lot of changes rn)

Map of the town

Put important details like the amount of money you have in the Chat Memory

✩ Important: Check my pinned comment and its replies for any updates. ✩

Edit: Thanks for all the chats and favorites! Also, I'd really appreciate any constructive comments about what is good about the bot and what could be better. <3

Feel free to publish chats, I’d love to see what you guys do with the bot!
